creator: marka@isc.org
text:
To make it easier to debug this minimal invokation fails.  Both
net-im/psi and graphics/qt4-iconengines succeed individually.  Note
net-im/psi depends on graphics/qt4-iconengines.  I suspect something
is not handling a null set.

Mark

drugs# portupgrade -cRn net-im/psi graphics/qt4-iconengines
--->  Session started at: Thu, 13 Aug 2009 15:03:22 +1000
